title: Chugach Alaska Corporation Ranks #6 on Alaska Business Monthly’s Top 49ers List
summary: Chugach ranked #6 among all Alaska companies for a third year in a row, and fifth among Alaska Native Corporations. Chugach’s 2014 revenue was more than $626 million, up from our 2013 revenue of more than $609 million. The list also included 20 regional and village corporations which, as a sector, r...
